deviations.description: The process model allows the phone company to send the SIM card after more than 30 days, but the new requirement obligates termination of the process if it takes more than 30 days. The process does not include a termination step after 30 days, directly violating the new obligation.
process_model_reference: send SIM card, process flow after 30 days

deviations.description: The modality has changed from permission to obligation, requiring the process to terminate if the SIM card is not sent within 30 days. The process model does not implement this termination, resulting in a violation of the stricter requirement.

The compliance pattern has changed from allowing a duration longer than 30 days to requiring the existence of a termination activity if the 30-day limit is exceeded. The process model does not include this control flow, resulting in non-compliance.

The activity has changed from 'send SIM card' to 'terminate process' after 30 days. The process model does not include a 'terminate process' activity triggered by exceeding the 30-day limit, violating the new requirement.
